title: Unable to login to account
description: Customer reports that they cannot log in using their email and password. They receive an authentication error despite resetting the password.

title: Billing discrepancy on last invoice
description: Customer noticed that their last invoice includes unexpected charges. They are requesting a detailed explanation and refund for the incorrect amount.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon launch. Issue occurs on Android 12 devices. Needs urgent fix.

title: Request for password reset email
description: Customer is unable to receive the password reset email. They need access urgently to continue using the service.

title: Feature request: Dark mode
description: Customer is requesting the addition of a dark mode in the web application for better accessibility during nighttime usage.

title: Error uploading documents
description: Customer experiences an error when trying to upload PDF files to the portal. The system throws a generic 'Upload Failed' message.

title: Account suspension without notice
description: Customer account was suspended without prior warning. They are requesting clarification and immediate reactivation.

title: Unable to change profile picture
description: Customer cannot update their profile picture in the account settings. The system fails to save changes after submission.

title: Two-factor authentication not working
description: Customer reports that they cannot receive the 2FA code on their phone. They are unable to complete login due to this issue.

title: Delay in order delivery
description: Customer reports that their order is delayed by three days past the estimated delivery date. They want status update and compensation.

title: Incorrect product shipped
description: Customer received the wrong product and requests replacement with the correct item immediately.

title: Unable to apply discount code
description: Customer reports that the discount code is not applied during checkout. They need assistance with the promotion.

title: Request to update contact information
description: Customer wants to update their registered phone number and email address. Current process is failing with error.

title: Website shows 500 server error
description: Customer reports that the company website shows a 500 error when trying to access the dashboard. Needs immediate attention.

title: Feedback on new chat feature
description: Customer provided feedback about the recently added chat feature, suggesting improvements in responsiveness and UI design.
